name: the-bodies-of-others
description: Naomi Wolf's investigation into authoritarianism during COVID-19 — emergency powers, fear-driven compliance, institutional mission failure, and the tools of resistance.
useCase: Spotting authoritarian drift in public health crises, understanding fear as a compliance tool, tracking power consolidation during emergencies, building effective resistance.
knownRisks: Naomi Wolf is a controversial figure whose claims have been disputed by mainstream fact-checkers
This book critiques widely accepted public health measures — users should read other sources with opposing views
The 'Great Reset' conspiracy theory framing may not align with mainstream understanding of WEF intentions
Some claims about COVID-19 mortality and lockdown efficacy are contested by public health authorities
